steps.t: Ansith is inside Gárferth's house, near the centre of Forlaw. Ansith and Ebba are preparing dinner after the long day.
Snow piles on the western side of Forlaw are building up. Most of the residents cannot remember the snow in Forlaw ever being quite this bad.
Cuthmar can be found on the western side of Forlaw busy with his chores.
Fence posts can be found scattered around the western side of Forlaw.
Cuthmar can be found on the western side of Forlaw busy with his chores.
